titleStmt.title: SII 26.490: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 490. (A.R. No. 466 of 1909.) ĀḺVĀR-TIRUNAGARI, TIRUCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete at the end.
It records a copy of the king's order contained in No. 489 above. The details such as the names of signatories, etc., are not available.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakravatti konerimaikoṇṭāṉ tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭut tirukkurukūrp poliñcuniṉṟaruḷiya piramasvāmikaḷ koyi
lil tirukkurukūr mahāmuṉikaḷ śiṣyarilt tiruvāymoḻi mahāmuṉikaḷukku Oṭanāṭṭaṭikaḷ ceyvikkiṟa Aruḷāḷadāsar
maṭattil vattikkum Aṣṭādaśaviṣayattu brahmavidvānkaḷukku bhojaṉa muḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku Innāṭṭu śrīvai
kuntamāṉa Irācentiraccaturvvedi maṅkalattuk kirāñci Iḷaiyadivākarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum kārampicceṭṭu Utaiyadi
vākarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum karumāṇikkāḻvāṉum pakkal Ivvoṭanāṭṭaṭikaḷ vilai koṇṭu kuṭutta Ivvūr piṭā
kai ceṅkaṉkuḷamum neṭuṅkuḷamum vilaiyolaippaṭi nāṉkellaik kuṭppaṭṭa nir nilamum karuñcey puṉ
ceyyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparappum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikki
yuḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāycciyum veṭṭipāṭṭa
mum pañcupiliyum cantuvigrahappeṟum vācaṟppeṟum Ilāñcaṉaippeṟum taṟiyiṟaiyum cekkipiṟaiyum taṭ
ṭolipāṭṭamum Iṭaiyar variyu miṉvariyum poṉvariyum maṟṟu mepperpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa nālāvatu muta
l maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu kāliṅkarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvoṭanāṭṭa
ṭikaḷ ceyvikkiṟa Aruḷāḷadāsar maṭattil vattikkum Aṣṭādaśaviṣayattu brahmavidvānkaḷukku bhojaṉa muḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku
I śrīvaikuntamāṉa Irācentiraccaturvvedimaṅkalattu kirāñci Iḷaiyativākarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum kārampicceṭṭu Utai
yativākarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭāruṅ karumāṇikkāḻvāṉum pakkal Ivvoṭanāṭṭaṭika
ḷ vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta Ivvūr piṭākai ceṅkaṉkuḷamun neṭuṅkuḷamum vilai Olaippaṭi
nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamuṅ karuñcey puṉceyum nattamun toṭṭamumkuḷamum ku
ḷapparappu muṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatānam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilaṅka
ṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyavūrāṭciyum ve
happeṟum vācalapeṟum Ilāñcaṉaippeṟum
Digital edition of SII 26.490 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
